context: Tests whether the response correctly explains the GraphQL N+1 problem and provides the standard solution.

checklist.name: Explains why N+1 happens in GraphQL
checklist.description: Explains that each field resolver runs independently, so the author resolver fires once per post

checklist.name: Recommends DataLoader or batching
checklist.description: Suggests DataLoader (or equivalent batching/coalescing library) to batch author lookups into a single query

checklist.name: Explains DataLoader mechanism
checklist.description: Describes how DataLoader collects IDs during a tick and makes one batched query (WHERE id IN (...))

checklist.name: Mentions per-request DataLoader instances
checklist.description: Notes that DataLoader instances should be created per-request to avoid stale cache across requests

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about GraphQL resolution or DataLoader
